use_cases: Display user activity as a GitHub-style contribution grid visualization
Convert text strings into gamified commit history graphics
Show contribution metrics on developer profiles and dashboards
Create interactive text-to-grid visualizations for portfolio sites
ai_summary: A React component that transforms text input into a GitHub-style contribution graph visualization. It maps characters to grid cell patterns using a letter-to-position encoding system, rendering them as green cells across a bordered grid. The component includes randomized color variations and animation delays for visual interest, making it ideal for displaying activity metrics, user contributions, or gamified text displays in developer-focused applications.
